# GET /api/menu/user-menu

**Get user menu based on permissions**

Returns menu tree structure for current logged-in user. Shows only pages where user has VIEW permission.

Operation ID: `getUserMenu`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

## Response `200` — OK

Shape: `array of MenuItemDto`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer (int64) | No |  |  |
| pageCode | string | No |  |  |
| nameAr | string | No |  |  |
| nameEn | string | No |  |  |
| routePath | string | No |  |  |
| parentId | integer (int64) | No |  |  |
| permCode | string | No |  |  |
| module | string | No |  |  |
| displayOrder | integer (int32) | No |  |  |
| icon | string | No |  |  |
| isActive | boolean | No |  |  |
| description | string | No |  |  |

## Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

|---|---|---|
| UNAUTHORIZED | UNAUTHORIZED | Endpoint requires authentication (global security requirement); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AuthenticationException to this status for every such endpoint. |
